mapper.select: SELECT rp.id, rp.risk_name, rp.risk_code, rp.town_street_name, rp.address, rp.prevent_status, org.organization_name, dip.id as deviceId, dip.device_type, dip.plan_quantity, dip.unit, dip.plan_install_start_date, dip.plan_install_end_date, dip.plan_install_start_date as plan_install_date FROM rp_risk_point rp LEFT JOIN tbl_organization org ON rp.org_id = org.id AND org.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN rp_device_install_plan dip ON rp.id = dip.risk_id AND dip.deleted = 0 WHERE rp.id = #{riskPointId}

SELECT rp.id, rp.risk_name, rp.risk_code, rp.town_street_name, rp.address, rp.prevent_status, org.organization_name, NULL as deviceId, NULL as device_type, NULL as plan_quantity, NULL as unit, NULL as plan_install_start_date, NULL as plan_install_end_date, NULL as plan_install_date FROM rp_risk_point rp LEFT JOIN tbl_organization org ON rp.org_id = org.id AND org.deleted = 0 WHERE rp.id = #{riskPointId} AND rp.deleted = 0
